lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (not owned by this task)

notes: Created enhanced-pdf-sections.ts with 4 exported render functions: renderExecutiveSummary, renderJourneyMap, renderJourneySentiment, renderPerspectiveComparison. Refactored pdf.ts to export createWorkspacePdf (returns jsPDF, skipFooter param, canvasElement accepts null to skip snapshot page) alongside the existing exportWorkspacePdf wrapper. canvas-view.tsx now uses handleEnhancedExportPdf callback that orchestrates all sections based on ExportConfig, fetches journey/perspective data lazily, and manages footer pagination across all pages. Stages fetched directly via Supabase browser client since no GET REST endpoint exists for /api/v1/stages. The 4 new export dialog sections (executiveSummary, journeyMap, journeySentiment, perspectiveComparison) remain available: false in export-pdf-dialog.tsx — that file is read-only for this slot; Slot 3 (BUG-038) will enable them.
